name: A New Dawn
description: The first sun rises on the village — the chief receives an extra gold immediately.

name: Stray Wolves
description: A small pack tests the perimeter from the north.

name: Foraging Run
description: Foragers return with extra wood for the bank.

name: Calm Winds
description: Steady weather; observers add a touch of science to the bank.

name: Bandit Scouts
description: Light raiders sniff out the eastern road.

name: Wild Boars
description: Boars charge in from the south column.

name: Travelling Mason
description: A passing mason donates a load of stone to the bank.

name: Highway Brigands
description: Brigands strike from the west.

name: Wolf Pack
description: A larger pack closes from the north.

name: Wandering Smith
description: A travelling smith barters trinkets for tools.

name: Whetstone Day
description: Sharpening day in the village; insights flow into the bank's science pool.

name: Bountiful Harvest
description: A windfall season — every domestic seat's produce yield doubles this round.

name: Cavalry Raid
description: Mounted raiders gallop down from the north.

name: Armoured Marauders
description: Heavy plate marches from the east.

name: Slingers
description: Skirmishers harass from the west.

name: River Trader
description: A trader's barge unloads gold to the bank.

name: Storm Warning
description: Black clouds on the horizon — the next threat strikes harder. +1 strength to the next resolved threat this round.

name: Marauder Cavalry
description: Hard-riding marauders aim for the centre.

name: Siege Engineers
description: Siege engineers bring rams from the east.

name: Market Day
description: A bustling market fills the bank with food and gold from passing merchants.

name: Quiet Council
description: Heads bowed in deliberation — no event cards may be played this round.

name: Iron Riders
description: Armoured cavalry pours in from the north.

name: Trebuchet Crew
description: A trebuchet rolls into range from the west.

name: Refugee Caravan
description: A caravan brings grain and tools.

name: Drilling Yard
description: Drilling exercises sharpen technique; the bank gains science.

name: Hired Mercenaries
description: Professional swords from the south.

name: Wyvern
description: A wyvern circles before swooping from the east.

name: Tribute Convoy
description: A vassal pays tribute in coin.

name: Heavy Cavalry
description: Plate-armoured horsemen storm from the west.

name: Catapult Battery
description: A catapult line drops shells from the north.

name: Chosen Champions
description: Elite enemy soldiers come up the southern path.

name: Forge Light
description: Forges burn through the night; the bank gains science and steel.

name: Shock Cavalry
description: Charge cavalry storms in from the east.

name: Ironclad Phalanx
description: An armoured phalanx grinds in from the south.

name: Fire Engines
description: Burning engines roll up from the west.

name: Allied Reinforcements
description: Friendly banners arrive bearing supplies.

name: The Last Settlement
description: The rival warlord himself arrives at the gates. Surviving his attacks ends the war in your favour.
